title: calendar.view.week.EventDragZone: drop() can result entering a different day, depending on the time zone
form.field.Text: afterSetMounted() => pass the mounted state to the field triggers
component.Base: unmount() => set mounted: false prior to the worker call
form.field.Text: labelPosition: inline => the top center border does no longer get updated (width)
calendar.view.EditEventContainer: styling for the dark theme
calendar.MainContainer: on scroll or select date, week => updateEvents()
form.field.Time: select current list item when mounting the picker
